common.description: Cross-platform performance monitoring (Tauri + Next.js + Sensor Service)

complete.title: All set!
complete.description: You've completed all the setup. Start using NexBox now!

optimization.windowsDesc: Optimize system performance and enhance gaming experience
optimization.title: Windows Optimization
optimization.description: Optimize system performance and enhance gaming experience

options.highPerformancePower: Switch to High Performance Power Plan

optimization.tip: Tip: After clicking start optimization, it will help you optimize the selected features. The optimization only takes effect once, and exiting the game or clicking the stop button will stop optimization

startupManager.title: Startup Manager
startupManager.tipDescription: Startup Manager helps you view and manage all auto-start items on your system. Disabling unnecessary startup items can speed up system boot time. Please proceed with caution, as some system startup items may be required for normal operation.

systemOptimize.title: System Optimization
systemOptimize.description: Optimize system services and privacy settings

optimizeAll.title: Enable All
optimizeAll.description: Turn on all switches to enable all optimizations

restore.title: Disable All
restore.description: Turn off all switches to disable all optimizations

networkOptimize.title: Network Optimization
networkOptimize.description: Optimize network parameters and DNS settings
networkOptimize.pageDesc: Optimize network parameters and DNS settings

tcpCongestion.title: TCP Congestion Control
tcpCongestion.description: Set TCP congestion control to CTCP/CUBIC for better throughput

chimney.title: TCP Chimney Offload
chimney.description: Disable TCP Chimney Offload to reduce latency

nagle.title: Nagle Algorithm
nagle.description: Disable Nagle algorithm to reduce small packet latency for gaming

adapterPower.title: Adapter Power Saving
adapterPower.description: Disable power saving on network adapters to reduce latency spikes

networkOptimize.dnsRequired: Please enter at least primary DNS address

batch.title: Batch Optimization
batch.description: Apply or restore all network optimizations at once

peripheralOptimize.pageDesc: Optimize mouse and keyboard registry parameters to reduce input lag

memoryLimit.title: Memory Limit
memoryLimit.description: Limit system available memory to optimize gaming performance
memoryLimit.warningText: Setting memory limit requires administrator privileges and system restart to take effect

powerManagement.title: Power Management
powerManagement.description: Import and activate optimized power plans for better gaming performance
powerManagement.tip: Power plans affect system power consumption and performance. High performance plans are recommended for gaming. Activating a power plan requires administrator privileges.
powerManagement.allImported: All power plans have been imported
powerManagement.deleteConfirmText: Are you sure you want to delete the power plan "{{name}}" from the system?

memoryCleanup.title: Memory Cleanup
memoryCleanup.description: View memory details and free up memory
memoryCleanup.autoCleanDesc: Automatically clean memory when conditions are met
memoryCleanup.thresholdDesc: Trigger cleanup when used memory exceeds this value

aceOptimize.title: Delta/ACE Optimize
aceOptimize.description: Delta Force process optimization and ACE anti-cheat resource limiting

deltaBoost.title: Priority Boost
deltaBoost.description: Set DeltaForceClient-Win64-Shipping.exe priority to RealTime for smoother gameplay
deltaBoost.affinityDescription: Assign Delta Force process to all CPU cores except CPU0 to maximize multi-core performance while reserving core 0 for system
deltaBoost.success: Delta Force priority boosted to real-time

aceSection.title: ACE Anti-Cheat Optimize
aceSection.subtitle: Limit anti-cheat resource usage, free more performance for the game

aceLimit.title: Priority Limit
aceLimit.description: Lower ACE-Tray, SGuard64, SGuardSvc64 priority to Low to reduce CPU contention
aceLimit.affinityDescription: Restrict ACE anti-cheat processes to single core (CPU0) only, preventing them from occupying critical game CPU resources
aceLimit.affinitySuccess: Restricted {{count}} ACE process(es) to single core

aceEfficiency.title: Windows Efficiency Mode
aceEfficiency.description: Enable task manager style efficiency mode for ACE processes: set priority to Idle + enable power throttling (EcoQoS), significantly reducing background resource usage

optimizeAll.title: Optimize All at Once
optimizeAll.description: Execute delta priority boost and ACE priority/core restrictions together

tools.title: Tools
tools.subtitle: Toolbox
tools.description: Provides various utilities to help you better manage and optimize your system.
tools.sjmclDesc: Third-party Minecraft launcher developed by Shanghai Jiao Tong University
tools.ddegameDesc: Games are not just games, they can enter life and change life
tools.huorongDesc: Pure endpoint protection. Lightweight, quiet, comprehensive defense

descriptions.windowsCoreOptimizer: Only effective for CPUs with big.LITTLE architecture
descriptions.windows-core-optimizer: Only effective for CPUs with big.LITTLE architecture
descriptions.huorong: Pure endpoint protection. Lightweight, quiet, comprehensive defense

messages.installerStartedDesc: Please complete the installation, the tool will show as available afterwards
messages.installCompleteDesc: Tool successfully installed, click to run
messages.installerStartedDescAlt: Please complete the installation, system will automatically detect installation status
messages.downloadCompleteDesc: Tool is ready, click to run

displayFilter.title: Display Filter
displayFilter.tip: Filter adjusts display gamma curve for color effects. Settings are automatically restored when the app exits.

floatingNav.title: Floating Navigation Box
floatingNav.previewNote: Preview effect (actual floating box is at the top center of the monitor)
floatingNav.tip: The floating navigation box will be displayed at the top center of the monitor, always staying on top of all windows. You can adjust the opacity to control its impact on other applications.

overlayPanel.title: Overlay Panel
overlayPanel.pingDescription: Select a server to measure network latency. The latency data will be displayed in the overlay
overlayPanel.minOneItem: At least one display item must be kept
overlayPanel.dragModeHint: Click to enter drag mode, click button again to exit and save position
overlayPanel.dragModeEnabled: Entered drag mode, click button to exit

deltaForce.weaponCodeDesc: Select a weapon code platform to browse and copy codes in a new window
deltaForce.mapToolDesc: Loot spots, spawn points, extraction points and boss coordinates
deltaForce.dlssPresetDesc: Select DLSS neural network model preset, different presets for different scenarios

K.name: Model K

deltaForce.author: Author
deltaForce.uploadQueueHint: Your loadout has been queued for review and will appear after approval

otherPlatforms.title: Other Gun Code Platforms
otherPlatforms.description: Here are some other gun code platforms. Click to open in a new window.

dlssPreset.title: Delta Force DLSS Settings

dlssLock.title: DLSS Lock

dlssPresetTable.title: Preset Reference Table

musicPlayer.empty: No music files, please put MP3 files in

builtinTools.resolutionConverterDesc: Convert aspect ratios at different resolutions
builtinTools.shaderCacheDesc: Clean up NVIDIA/AMD shader cache to free disk space
builtinTools.dlssPresetDesc: Switch DLSS model presets to optimize game graphics
builtinTools.dynamicIslandDesc: Floating island on screen, showing network speed/hardware/music/notifications
builtinTools.screenRecordDesc: Record screen or window with adjustable resolution & frame rate

gpuRename.title: GPU Rename
gpuRename.note:
⚠️ Important Notes:
1. Administrator privileges required to modify the registry
2. Requires restarting the game or computer to take effect
3. Only supports Windows systems and NVIDIA GPUs
4. If you can't apply changes, try running as Administrator

tests.title: Tests
tests.aimInstruction: Click Start, click as many targets as possible in 30 seconds!
tests.focusInstruction1: Hold mouse to track the moving energy ball
tests.focusInstruction2: Keep cursor inside the ball to score. Ball moves and breathes
tests.choiceInstruction1: A target appears in the center. Quickly pick the matching option below
tests.choiceInstruction2: Choose quickly and accurately. Get the highest score in 30 seconds!
tests.inhibitInstruction: Green = click fast to score. Red = don't click. Faster and more accurate = higher score!
tests.schulteInstruction1: Click numbers in order (1→2→3→...→25) as fast as possible
tests.schulteInstruction2: Focus on the center, use peripheral vision to search
tests.cpsDesc: Click as fast as you can within the time limit!
tests.cpsInstruction: Click as fast as you can within the time limit

generalSettings.title: General Settings
generalSettings.todayPopularityDesc: Show today's popularity random number on homepage
generalSettings.randomQuoteDesc: Show random quote card on homepage
generalSettings.gameLauncherDesc: Show quick launch card on homepage
generalSettings.homeHardwareModelDesc: Show a brief summary of CPU/GPU/RAM/Motherboard/Storage on the homepage
generalSettings.splashLogoDesc: Customize the logo image shown during startup
generalSettings.discoveryPageDesc: Change whether the left navigation bar on the instance page is displayed and its grouping method
generalSettings.navModeDesc: Change the display and grouping method of the instance page left navigation bar
generalSettings.quickSwitchDesc: When enabled, clicking the switch button on the launch page allows you to directly select an account or instance without navigating to another page
generalSettings.resourceTranslationDesc: When enabled, the resource download page will attempt to display Simplified Chinese translations for names or descriptions
generalSettings.autoLanguageDesc: When enabled, newly created instances will automatically be set to Simplified Chinese, which will also skip accessibility settings
generalSettings.autoStartDesc: Automatically launch NexBox when system starts
generalSettings.closeBehaviorDesc: Choose what happens when clicking the close button
generalSettings.pageTransitionDesc: Disable to turn off page transition animations

appearanceSettings.title: Appearance Settings
appearanceSettings.liquidGlassDesc: When enabled, some interfaces will use the "Liquid Glass" effect, which may affect performance
appearanceSettings.imageUrlPlaceholder: Enter image URL or click to upload
appearanceSettings.dynamicBackgroundDesc: When enabled, dynamic background effect will be displayed
appearanceSettings.themeColorDesc: Set the theme color for navigation bar, buttons, menus and other elements

networkSettings.title: Network Latency Test
networkSettings.description: Test network latency to various servers

sponsorSettings.title: Support the Developer
sponsorSettings.description: If you find NexBox helpful, consider buying the author a coffee ☕

aboutSettings.title: About
aboutSettings.author: Author

updateModal.title: New Version Available
updateModal.downloadComplete: Download complete. Please choose an action.

resolutionConverter.title: Resolution Converter
resolutionConverter.tip: Select a resolution type to see the specific resolution values for three common aspect ratios below, helping you adjust aspect ratio settings in games.

systemOptimizer.pageDesc: Toggle system optimizations for better performance and privacy

system.performanceTweaksDesc: Auto-end hung tasks, reduce timeouts, show hidden files, optimize multimedia
system.removeMenuDelayDesc: Reduce menu show delay to 0 for snappier UI
system.disableErrorReportingDesc: Turn off Windows Error Reporting service
system.disablePrintServiceDesc: Disable print spooler service, saves resources if no printer
system.disableFaxServiceDesc: Disable fax service, safe to turn off if not used
system.disableStickyKeysDesc: Disable sticky, filter, and toggle keys accessibility features
system.disableSmartScreenDesc: Turn off Microsoft Defender SmartScreen filter
system.disableCEIPDesc: Disable Customer Experience Improvement Program telemetry
system.disableTrkWksDesc: Disable TrkWks service, stop NTFS link tracking (requires restart)
system.enableLargeSysCacheDesc: Enable large system cache for better performance (requires restart)
system.disableSpectrePatchDesc: Disable CPU speculation patches for better performance (reduces security)
system.disableAutoDebugDesc: Disable automatic system debugging for faster crash recovery
system.disableCrashDumpDesc: Prevent writing debug info on system crash, reduce disk writes
system.disableWfpDiagDesc: Disable Windows Filtering Platform diagnostic ETL logging

disk.disableSystemRestoreDesc: Turn off system restore point creation, free up disk space
disk.disableSuperfetchDesc: Disable SysMain service and prefetch, reduce disk I/O
disk.disableHibernateDesc: Turn off system hibernation, free up disk space (~RAM size)
disk.disableNtfsTimestampDesc: Disable NTFS last access time updates, reduce disk writes
disk.disableMyPeopleDesc: Disable the My People taskbar feature
disk.disableTPMCheckDesc: Bypass TPM 2.0 and CPU compatibility checks
disk.disableSensorServicesDesc: Disable sensor and location services for privacy
disk.removeCastToDeviceDesc: Remove 'Cast to Device' from the context menu

privacy.disableTelemetryTasksDesc: Disable dozens of Windows CEIP and diagnostic scheduled tasks
privacy.disableHomeGroupDesc: Disable HomeGroup listener and provider services
privacy.disableSmb1Desc: Disable outdated SMBv1 protocol for better security
privacy.disableTelemetryServicesDesc: Disable DiagTrack, dmwappushservice and compatibility engine
privacy.disableCortanaDesc: Disable Cortana, web search, and cloud search features
privacy.disableNewsInterestsDesc: Disable taskbar news and interests widget
privacy.disableStartMenuAdsDesc: Disable promotional suggestions and auto-installed apps
privacy.disableEdgeTelemetryDesc: Disable Edge personalization, feedback, and metrics telemetry
privacy.disableDocumentsAccessDesc: Prevent apps from accessing the user's document library
privacy.disableCalendarAccessDesc: Prevent apps from accessing the user's calendar data
privacy.disableContactsAccessDesc: Prevent apps from accessing the user's contacts
privacy.disableWelcomeExperienceDesc: Disable Windows welcome experience and consumer features
privacy.disableFeedbackFrequencyDesc: Reduce system feedback frequency and disable notifications
privacy.disableWritingHabitsDesc: Prevent collection of user writing and typing habit data
privacy.disableAddressBookCollectDesc: Prevent system from collecting address book contact data
privacy.disableTypingCollectionDesc: Prevent system from collecting keyboard input data
privacy.disableSilentAppInstallDesc: Prevent automatic installation of promoted applications
privacy.disableWiFiHotspotsDesc: Prevent auto-connecting to shared WiFi hotspots
privacy.disableTypingInsightsDesc: Prevent input data collection for personalized suggestions
privacy.disablePreinstalledAppsDesc: Prevent automatic installation of third-party apps and promotions
privacy.disableWiFiSenseDesc: Disable WiFi Sense, prevent auto-connecting to shared networks
privacy.disableStepRecorderDesc: Disable Steps Recorder (psr.exe), protect operation privacy

apps.disableOfficeTelemetryDesc: Disable Office telemetry agents and scheduled tasks
apps.disableFirefoxTelemetryDesc: Disable Firefox telemetry via group policy
apps.disableChromeTelemetryDesc: Disable Chrome metrics, cleanup reporting via group policy
apps.disableNvidiaTelemetryDesc: Disable NVIDIA telemetry container service and tasks
apps.disableVsTelemetryDesc: Disable VS telemetry switch and collector service

touch.disableWindowsInkDesc: Disable Windows Ink workspace and inking suggestions
touch.disableSpellCheckDesc: Disable touch keyboard autocorrect, spell check, and text prediction
touch.disableCloudClipboardDesc: Disable clipboard history and cross-device sync

gaming.enableGameModeDesc: Enable hardware accelerated GPU scheduling and game mode
gaming.disableXboxLiveDesc: Disable Xbox Live auth, game save, and background services
gaming.disableGameBarDesc: Disable game bar, DVR recording, and background recording

systemOptimizer.scanHint: Click 'Scan System State' to detect current optimization status. Items requiring reboot will be tracked via saved state.
systemOptimizer.requiresReboot: Requires system reboot to take full effect

shaderCache.title: Shader Cache Cleanup
shaderCache.vendorSubtitle: Organize cleanup items by vendor, NVIDIA selected by default.

nvidia.name: NVIDIA
nvidia.description: Clean DXCache, GLCache, NV_Cache following NVIDIA official paths.

amd.name: AMD
amd.description: Clean AMD Software Reset Shader Cache user-level cache directories.

officialTip.title: NVIDIA Official Recommendation
officialTip.description: Follow the steps below before running cleanup on this page.
officialTip.step1: 1. Open NVIDIA Control Panel, set shader cache size to Disabled in 3D Settings.
officialTip.step2: 2. Restart your computer, then come back and run "Clean NVIDIA".
officialTip.step3: 3. After cleanup, re-enable shader cache. The size depends on your C drive capacity.

shaderCache.noVendorSelected: Please select at least one GPU vendor
